policy: Official NASA, JPL, USGS or ESA products only. The ledger covers the complete 48-body Gate 3B visual registry. A candidate is not classified as a runtime real/derived map until source pixels or shape data are imported, transformed, licensed, hashed, orientation-calibrated and recorded in the runtime override ledger.

candidates.product: Moon LRO LROC WAC Global Morphology Mosaic 100m
candidates.availability: public-domain; downloadable GeoTIFF and 1024px browse image
candidates.coverage: global-map
candidates.integrationNote: Reviewed official global map imported into a 2K runtime derivative. Small no-data seams were cleaned without inventing large-scale landmarks; final seam, pole and lighting acceptance still requires manual GPU review.
